title: Cremanthodium coriaceum
taxonomy: Cremanthodium coriaceum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and related areas. The plant belongs to the genus Cremanthodium, which consists of species primarily found in the Himalayan region. The exact classification of Cremanthodium coriaceum may vary, but it is generally considered an annual or biennial herb. Further research is required to confirm the specific classification of this plant species.
